items.title: Republican says ‘Muslims don’t belong in American society,’ draws fierce Democratic backlash
items.description: Republican Rep. Andy Ogles of Tennessee sparked a wave of criticism from Democrats after declaring that "Muslims don't belong in American society."

items.title: House GOP fears primary losers could jeopardize razor-thin majority
items.description: House Republicans say colleagues who lose primaries could start missing votes — and with just two votes to spare after this week, the margin is tight.
